title: Landmark Legal Precedent
description: Our testimony in the landmark Little Mix BSL case helped establish that BSL access at live events is a legal requirement under the Equality Act 2010 - not optional. That ruling changed the industry.

title: Proactive Access at Wembley
description: In September 2021, Wembley Stadium committed to BSL interpreting at every concert as standard - with PI as the appointed provider. Proactive access at the national stadium. By default, not by exception.

title: Signature Hall of Fame
description: Performance Interpreting was part of the inaugural Signature Hall of Fame intake in November 2022 - the highest recognition in the BSL interpreting industry - for outstanding contribution to interpreting services and Deaf access.

title: Trusted for National Moments
description: Selected to manage and deliver full Deaf access for the 2023 King's Coronation and subsequent Royal events and state ceremonies - including BSL interpreting, live captions and induction loop systems across multiple venues.

title: The PI Events App
description:
Launched in 2026 - a free app for Deaf attendees to find interpreted events, see interpreter names, use on-site support tools, and share feedback.

No other interpreting service offers this.
